_warning: This file is IMMUTABLE. chmod 444. The agent cannot and must not edit it. Only the human owner edits this file.
_description: These are the rules the agent MUST follow when editing perennial files during weekly compilation.

guidelines_insights.purpose: Record observable and verifiable behavioral patterns of the house and its residents.
rules: Only record a pattern if observed on at least 3 distinct days.
Each pattern must be a short, factual sentence — no emotional interpretation.
Maximum 30 patterns. If full, replace the oldest or least relevant.
Never record medical, financial, or private conversation data as patterns.
Pending items must be actionable: something the agent or user can resolve.
Remove a pending item when resolved or after 30 days without mention.

guidelines_soul.purpose: Define the agent's personality, tone, and behavioral rules.
rules: The agent may propose adjustments to soul.json but must NEVER alter: name, mission, or values.
Allowed adjustments: refine behavioral rules based on explicit user feedback.
Example allowed: 'User asked to include tomorrow's forecast in the briefing' → add rule.
Example forbidden: changing tone from 'direct' to 'expansive' without explicit request.
Maximum 15 behavioral rules. Consolidate if necessary.

guidelines_users.purpose: Maintain updated profiles of residents based on observation and interaction.
rules: Update preferences only when the user demonstrates consistently (3+ times) or asks explicitly.
Never infer emotional or health states as permanent preferences.
Schedules and routine patterns may be updated based on daily log data.
New residents or frequent visitors may be added after 3+ appearances.
Keep minimal data: name, role, comfort preferences, interaction style.

guidelines_allowed_actions.purpose: Propose autonomous actions the agent can execute without asking for confirmation.
rules: Every proposed action MUST include a Telegram notification — no silent actions ever.
Only propose actions based on patterns observed consistently (3+ occurrences).
Actions must be reversible or low-risk: climate control, lights, notifications. Never propose actions involving locks, alarms, purchases, or irreversible changes.
Each action must have a cooldown of at least 60 minutes to prevent loops.
Conditions must be specific and verifiable: use exact entity_ids, numeric thresholds, and time ranges.
Maximum 10 approved actions at any time.
The agent proposes, the user approves. NEVER auto-approve actions.
If an action was repeatedly overridden by the user (3+ times), propose its removal.
